description: The `v-snackbar` component is used to display a quick message to a user. Snackbars support positioning, removal delay, and callbacks.

props.loading: Displays a loading spinner in the prepend area.
props.prependAvatar: Displays an avatar in the prepend area using the provided image source.
props.prependIcon: Displays an icon in the prepend area.
props.reverseTimer: Reverses the direction of the timer progress bar, filling up instead of depleting.
props.timer: Display a progress bar that counts down until the snackbar closes. Use `bottom` to change the default placement.
props.timerColor: Sets the color of the timer progress bar.
props.timeout: Time (in milliseconds) to wait until snackbar is automatically hidden. Use `-1` to keep open indefinitely. It is recommended for this number to be between `4000` and `10000`. Changes to this property will reset the countdown.
props.transition: Sets the component transition. Can be one of the [built in](/styles/transitions/) or custom transition. Supports special location-aware mode with **slide-auto** and **scroll-auto**
props.collapsed: Alters the element size fit behind front snackbar in the queue.
props.queueGap: Sets the offset to show collapsed snackbars as a stack. Requires value in pixels.
props.queueIndex: The index position of this snackbar within a queue.
props.vertical: Stacks snackbar content on top of the actions (button).

slots.actions: Used to bind styles to [v-btn](/components/buttons) to match MD2 specification.
slots.header: Slot for custom content above the snackbar body.

exposed.animateClick: Function invoked when user clicks outside.
exposed.globalTop: Used by activator to determine a components position in the global stack order.
exposed.localTop: Used by activator to determine a components position in the local stack order.
